2605.17721.title: EXG: Self-Evolving Agents with Experience Graphs
2605.17721.paper_summary: Large language model (LLM)-based agents have demonstrated strong capabilities in complex reasoning and problem solving through multi-step interactions, yet most deployed agents remain behaviorally static, with knowledge acquired during execution rarely translating into systematic improvement over time. In response, a growing line of work on self-evolving agents explores how agents can improve through experience during deployment, but most existing approaches either rely on ad hoc reflection limited to single-task correction or adopt unstructured memory that accumulates fragmented experience with delayed usability. To address this limitation, we introduce EXG, an experience graph framework for self-evolving agents that explicitly organizes accumulated successes and failures into a structured, relational representation. EXG is the first experience graph designed for self-evolving agents, supporting both online, real-time graph growth during execution for immediate cross-task experience reuse, and offline reuse of a consolidated experience graph as an external memory module. This design also enables EXG to serve as a plug-and-play component for existing self-evolving agents, organizing prior experience into a unified experience graph and improving both solution quality and resource efficiency as deployment progresses. Extensive experiments across code generation and reasoning benchmarks show that EXG attains more favorable performance-efficiency trade-offs than reflection- and memory-based baselines in both online and offline evaluations. Our results suggest that structuring experience as a graph provides a principled foundation for scalable and transferable self-evolving agent behavior.
2605.17721.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型 (LLM) 基礎的代理已顯示出在複雜推理和問題解決方面的強大能力，通過多步互動進行，但大多數已部署的代理仍然行為靜態，執行過程中獲得的知識很少能夠隨時間轉化為系統性的改善。為此，越來越多的自我演化代理研究探索了代理如何在部署期間通過經驗進行改進，但大多數現有方法要麼依賴於僅限於單一任務修正的臨時反思，要麼採用結構不清的記憶，積累了延遲可用性的零碎經驗。為了解決這一限制，我們引入了 EXG，一個自我演化代理的經驗圖框架，明確地將積累的成功和失敗組織成一個結構化的關係表示。EXG 是第一個為自我演化代理設計的經驗圖，支持在執行期間的在線實時圖形增長，以便立即重用跨任務經驗，以及作為外部記憶模塊的離線重用整合經驗圖。這一設計還使 EXG 能夠作為現有自我演化代理的即插即用組件，將先前的經驗組織成統一的經驗圖，並隨著部署的進展改善解決方案質量和資源效率。在代碼生成和推理基準的廣泛實驗中顯示，EXG 在在線和離線評估中都達到了比基於反思和記憶的基準更有利的性能效率權衡。我們的結果表明，將經驗結構化為圖形為可擴展和可轉移的自我演化代理行為提供了一個原則性的基礎。
2605.17721.author: Yuxin Jin et.al.
2605.17721.authors: Yuxin Jin, Siyuan Zhang, Hanchen Wang, Lu Qin, Ying Zhang, Wenjie Zhang
